notes: Wave 2 cross-reference and validation for all routes within/through Mandaluyong City. Sources: validated-shaw-boulevard-corridor, validated-edsa-corridor, validated-ortigas-avenue-corridor, mrt3-feeder-routes, ltfrb-jeepney/bus/uv-express, sakay-ph, moovit, p2p-routes, mandaluyong.gov.ph, web research. MRT-3 has 3 stations in/bordering Mandaluyong (Boni, Shaw, Ortigas). EDSA Central Terminal (Shaw/EDSA) is the primary transit hub.

routes.route_name: MRT-3 — Boni, Shaw Blvd, Ortigas stations (Mandaluyong segment)
routes.notes: Three MRT-3 stations in Mandaluyong. Ortigas station is shared boundary with Pasig. Shaw Blvd station is NOT served by EDSA Carousel BRT (major gap).
EDSA Carousel passes through Mandaluyong at Boni and Ortigas stops. Shaw Blvd MRT station does NOT have a Carousel stop — commuters must use MRT-3 at Shaw or walk to Boni/Ortigas Carousel stops.

routes.route_name: P2P RRCG — Starmall EDSA Shaw–Alabang Town Center
routes.frequency_notes: 30+ trips/day weekdays 6:30AM-10PM; 9 trips Saturday; limited Sunday
routes.notes: Primary P2P from Mandaluyong. Also serves as hub stop for RRCG Robinsons Cainta-Greenbelt 5 (P90/P72) and SM Masinag-One Ayala (P140/P112). Fare: P140 regular, P112 discounted.

routes.route_name: City Bus Route 12 — Kalentong–Pasig via Shaw Blvd
routes.notes: Listed in MC 2020-019 rationalization under Shaw corridor. Contested: may conflict with pre-rationalization Route 12 (Pasig-Taytay via Ortigas Ave). No operator confirmed. Kalentong is the western Mandaluyong boundary at Manila. See also validated-shaw-boulevard-corridor.md.

routes.frequency_notes: Regular service; frequency not individually documented
routes.notes: Terminates at EDSA Central terminal (Starmall EDSA-Shaw, Mandaluyong). LTFRB code UVE-N64.
LTFRB code UVE-C68. Confirmed multi-source: ltfrb-uv-express + validated-marcos-highway.

routes.route_name: Antipolo – EDSA Shaw Blvd. (Wack-Wack) UV Express
routes.notes: LTFRB code UVE-RIZ-04. Also coded MH-UV-007 in validated-marcos-highway. Terminal at EDSA Shaw Blvd (Wack-Wack), which may be a separate UV Express unloading zone north of the Shaw/EDSA intersection from the main EDSA Central Starmall terminal.
LTFRB code UVE-RIZ-06. Confirmed by ltfrb-uv-express + validated-shaw-blvd.
LTFRB code UVE-RIZ-09. Confirmed by ltfrb-uv-express + LTFRB DB.

routes.frequency_notes: 4AM-10PM daily; standard modern PUJ frequency (~5-10 min peak)
routes.notes: Sakay route DOTR:R_SAKAY_MPUJ_825. Modern PUJ (electric/Euro-IV). Runs from eastern Mandaluyong (Arayat/Daang Bakal area) westward via Boni/Pinatubo terminal toward Manila (Ramon Magsaysay Blvd/Altura area = 'Stop & Shop' terminus). Cross-city route.

key_stops: Boni Ave/Sto. Rosario (Mandaluyong City Medical Center)
routes.frequency_notes: Regular service; standard PUJ estimate ~5-10 min peak
routes.notes: Sakay route DOTR:R_SAKAY_2018_PUJ_273. Traditional PUJ. Key stops document Boni Ave corridor through Mandaluyong including City Hall area (Maysilo Circle). JRC = Jose Rizal College (now JRU) on Shaw Blvd at Kalentong. Likely to be replaced by MPUJ_826 under PUV Modernization.

routes.destination: New Panaderos Extension/34 Rte. Rev. G. Aglipay Intersection, Mandaluyong
key_stops: Mandaluyong City Medical Center (Boni Ave/Sto. Rosario)
routes.notes: Sakay route DOTR:R_SAKAY_MPUJ_826. Modern PUJ replacement for PUJ_273. Terminal at Robinsons Complex (Boni/EDSA area) vs PUJ_273 which uses Pinatubo terminal. Almost identical Boni Ave alignment. RTU is a documented stop. Both PUJ_273 and MPUJ_826 may co-exist during PUV Modernization transition.

routes.route_name: EDSA/Shaw Central – Tipas (Taguig) via San Joaquin → Pateros (PUJ_916/T279)
routes.notes: Sakay live: DOTR:R_SAKAY_PUJ_916. LTFRB code T279. Same route, different coding systems. Originates from EDSA Central Terminal in Mandaluyong. Tipas (Taguig) is intermediate stop; final destination is Pateros.
Sakay live: DOTR:R_SAKAY_PUJ_923. Long-haul route from EDSA Central (Mandaluyong) to Morong in Rizal Province.

Moovit ID 7637818; 22 stops, 35 min. Manila (Sta. Mesa area) to Mandaluyong (EDSA-Boni). May be related to PUJ_273 reverse direction but different Manila terminus (Paltok vs Kalentong/JRC). Needs LTFRB code verification.

routes.origin: Daang Bakal/New Panaderos Extension Intersection, Mandaluyong
routes.notes: Moovit ID 7638054. Intra-Mandaluyong route in eastern sector near JRU area (Daang Bakal=old railroad corridor; Arayat is a street in Mandaluyong). No LTFRB code identified. May be partial segment of MPUJ_825 or a distinct short-haul route.

routes.route_name: J.P. Rizal – Shaw Blvd (Mandaluyong) short route
routes.notes: Moovit ID 7637758. Very short (5 stops) intra-Mandaluyong route connecting J.P. Rizal St (southern sector, near Haig/Vergara area) to Shaw Blvd. Reverse (Haig→J.P. Rizal) has 6 stops and ~10 min. No LTFRB code.

routes.destination: Jose Rizal University, J. Fabella St., Mandaluyong
routes.notes: Moovit ID 7638065. Intra-Mandaluyong, 20 stops, 31 min. Covers eastern Mandaluyong from Barangka Ilaya to JRU (near Daang Bakal/New Panaderos area). Reverse (JRU→Alchan) also 20 stops, 29 min. JRU at 80 Shaw Blvd = near Kalentong. No LTFRB code. JRU was formerly JRC (Jose Rizal College), which is why Kalentong/JRC was historically the Shaw-Manila boundary stop.
Moovit ID 7638311. Intra-Mandaluyong, 19 stops, 26 min. Connects Daang Bakal corridor to Alchan (Barangka Ilaya). May overlap with or be part of the same route network as Moovit 7638054 and 7638065.

routes.route_name: MRT-3 Boni/EDSA-Pinatubo – Daang Bakal/New Panaderos Extension
routes.destination: Daang Bakal/New Panaderos Extension Intersection, Mandaluyong
routes.notes: Moovit ID 7637768. 10 stops, 18 min. Connects MRT-3 Boni Station area to eastern Mandaluyong (Daang Bakal corridor). Key MRT feeder route for interior Mandaluyong east of EDSA.

Moovit ID 7637796. Shaw Blvd westward into southern Mandaluyong/Makati boundary. Sierra Madre and Sultan are streets in Makati near Comembo/Guadalupe area. Route likely uses J.P. Rizal Extension or J.P. Rizal St to connect Shaw to Makati. No LTFRB code.

LTFRB MPUJ-007 (ltfrb-modernization). Also cross-referenced as MODERN-009 in ltfrb-jeepney. Crosses Makati-Mandaluyong boundary. Terminates at Mandaluyong City Hall (Maysilo Circle). Distinct from eSakay E-Jeepney (MRT3-BUE-F04) which extends to Circuit Makati.

routes.route_name: eSakay E-Jeepney – Buendia MRT to Circuit Makati/Mandaluyong City Hall
routes.notes: eSakay brand (Meralco subsidiary, electric jeepney). Extends Buendia MRT catchment into Mandaluyong City Hall area. Flat fare P9. Distinct from MPUJ-007 which is a traditional/modern PUJ franchise.

routes.destination: E. Rodriguez Ave/Vargas Ave, Brgy. Ugong, Pasig
routes.notes: LTFRB T276. Originates from EDSA Central Terminal in Mandaluyong, eastbound into Pasig.
LTFRB T277. Sakay reference and validated-ortigas-corridor cross-reference. T278 is a minor alignment variant of T277; collapse to T277 in GTFS with note.
OSM code T290 (16.3 km). Confirmed by OSM + Moovit reverse direction. Terminates at EDSA/Shaw in Mandaluyong.
Wikipedia (Shaw Blvd article). No LTFRB franchise code identified. Uses western Shaw Blvd segment (Mandaluyong side of Kalentong bridge). May be a named segment of a longer traditional PUJ.

Sakay LTFRB_PUJ1001 (low detail). Also referenced in Moovit (serves Maysilo Circle area per web research). Wikipedia lists 'Hulo – P. Victorino/Kalentong' as a Shaw Blvd western segment route. Hulo is a barangay in northern Mandaluyong near Pasig River.

routes.route_name: T266: AFP/PNP Taguig – Guadalupe (ABC) / EDSA Central Mandaluyong
routes.destination: EDSA Central Jeepney Terminal, Mandaluyong / Guadalupe MRT
routes.notes: LTFRB T266 (per mrt3-feeder). Serves military/police housing in Taguig heading north to Guadalupe MRT and EDSA Central. EDSA Central is in Mandaluyong. Passes through Makati (Guadalupe MRT) en route.
Rome2rio confirmed. Short Shaw Blvd segment from Mandaluyong into Pasig (Kapitolyo area). High frequency short-haul connector.
LTFRB code UVE-RIZ-11. Also MH-UV-010 in validated-marcos-highway. Tanay is a distant Rizal municipality.

routes.route_name: Vista Mall Taguig – Starmall EDSA Shaw (MetroExpress P2P)
routes.notes: Single source (p2p-routes.json). MetroExpress Connect Inc. No fare data confirmed. Terminates at Starmall EDSA-Shaw in Mandaluyong.
Sakay LTFRB_PUJ1001. Low detail in source; likely same as HULO-KALENTONG-JRC above. May be duplicate entry. Keep separate pending field verification.

routes.route_name: EDSA Shaw – Ortigas Complex (T235, short CBD connector)
routes.notes: OSM only, low detail. LTFRB code T235. Very short route from EDSA/Shaw Central Terminal to Ortigas Complex (Pasig). Possibly absorbed into T277 or T276 alignments.
